dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires detection of 'rising volume trend during pattern formation' which cannot be precisely quantified without additional context. Translated as: volume greater than previous bar (rising trend indicator) AND upward breakout (close > prev_close). Exit condition reversed from entry: volume declining signals trend exhaustion. Success rates (30% bull, 24% bear) noted but not encoded as they are statistical outcomes, not actionable conditions. Pattern formation detection would require external pattern recognition not available in indicator set.

source_rule_text: Rising volume trend during pattern formation with upward breakout
